finalized_plan.description: Retrieve a complete list of U.S. presidents along with their birth cities from reliable historical sources
Filter the list to include only those birth cities that are within the United States
For each identified city, obtain its geographical coordinates (longitude values) from verified geographic data sources
Identify the city with the smallest (most negative) longitude value as the farthest west
Identify the city with the largest (most positive) longitude value as the farthest east
Confirm that these two birth cities are correct by cross-checking multiple reliable sources
Output the names of these two cities in alphabetical order, separated by a comma

root_cause_reasoning: The model reasoned through the problem and directly identified the answer without executing web search
